case_title: MEADOWS, RAY A. VS LOMBARD TOW INC.

docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-28-1994, GRANTED
MOVAC CONT' TO JULY 25, AT 7:00PM HAS BEEN CHANGED TO AUG 31 AT 1:30PM. ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE QUIDACH AY. DATE CORRECTED ON CALENDAR MENU AND REPRINTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOMBARD TOW INC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY MEADOWS, RAY A. AS TO DEFENDANT LOMBARD TOW INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-23-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEADOWS, RAY A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOMBARD TOW INC. $125.00 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $164.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PLNTF. REQUESTED CONTINUACE ON MOTION TO VACATE RESERVED ON 31 AUG.94 AT 1:30PM SENT TO JUDGE FOR SIGNATURE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEADOWS, RAY A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOMBARD TOW INC. $375.00 PRINCIPAL, $78.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $453.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
